rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO JUDO INSTITUTE VS. MICHAEL GRANT et al

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 05, 2013, line 5. Order To Show Cause For Tro And Preliminary Injunction Continued to December 23, 2013 per request of the parties. TRO is to remain in effect. Defendant may file a further declaration and status report on December 16, 2013 and serve it by e-mail. Plaintiff may file its reply on December 18, 2103 and serve it by e-mail. Moving party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)
